title: Vietnamese Pho
description: A classic Vietnamese noodle soup made with beef broth, beef slices, and rice noodles. This recipe is a simplified version of the traditional dish.
instructions: 1. In a large pot, combine beef broth, pho spices, and fish sauce. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Cook rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
4. Slice rare steak into thin strips.
5. Add beef slices to the pot and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until cooked to desired doneness.
6. Add cooked noodles to the pot and stir to combine.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Serve hot, garnished with toasted onions and lime wedges.
9. Allow each guest to assemble their own bowl with noodles, beef, and desired toppings.
